productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Wooster Analogue Digital Watch
description: Product descriptionStyled for the fashion conscious, the adidas Wooster analogue-digital wrist watch is replete with features that make it a great wear for workout sessions.Case diameter: 42 mmCase thickness: 14 mmDial shape: RoundWhite polyurethane strap and round polycarbonate case for enhanced style, durability and comfortFixed white plastic bezel with logo and second markers etched for added durability and styleLight grey digital Chronograph dial displaying time and dateWater resistant, stainless steel case back for enhanced durabilityDigital alarm Backlight to view time in low light conditionsTang clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckleQuartz movement of time display using a paper-thin piece of synthetic quartz to ensure accurate 10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance  at 50 meters or 165 feet, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling, skin-diving, and swimming
